subcodes.first_line: O spiritual counsellor! The education of young children is even as the work of a gardener in the gardens of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستشار روحانی تعلیم اطفال نورسیده بمثابه باغبانی در حدائق رحمانیست اطفال
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator
